_comment_doc: WatchMyAgents starter policy bundle — MITRE ATT&CK + ATLAS coverage. Tune to your environment before promoting from mode=shadow → mode=enforce. See docs/MITRE-ATTCK-COVERAGE.md for technique mapping. Every policy ships in shadow mode so the first run only LOGS would-be decisions without blocking — calibrate, then promote.
_comment_lifecycle: Lifecycle: observe → shadow → enforce → retired. Per [[project_recursive_fractal_loop]], shadow is the calibration bench (Platt scaling + diff-in-diff efficacy). Promote a rule to mode=enforce only after you've seen enough shadow decisions to be confident the rule isn't false-positiving on your workload.
_comment_uses: Uses v1.2.0+ DSL extensions (gt, in_range, length_gt) and ctx.* namespace (hour_of_day_utc, recent_error_rate, event_count_recent). Falls back gracefully on v1.1.x where unknown operators / ctx paths fail-closed (no false-allow).

policies.name: T1567 Exfiltration Over Web Service — large outbound POST
policies.message: MITRE T1567: outbound POST exceeds 1MB threshold. Likely exfil channel.

policies.name: T1041 Exfiltration Over C2 Channel — host allowlist
policies.message: MITRE T1041: outbound to non-allowlisted host. Replace the regex with your trusted egress hosts.

policies.name: T1485 Data Destruction — destructive shell patterns
policies.message: MITRE T1485: destructive shell pattern (rm -rf / mkfs / dd if=).

policies.name: T1548 Abuse Elevation Control — sudo / pkexec / doas
policies.message: MITRE T1548: privilege-escalation attempt via sudo / pkexec / doas.

policies.name: T1059 Command and Scripting Interpreter — improbably long command
policies.message: MITRE T1059: bash command exceeds 2KB — likely a base64-encoded payload or pipeline obfuscation.

policies.name: T1083 File and Directory Discovery — outside business hours (late)
policies.message: MITRE T1083: file discovery between 22:00 and 23:59 UTC. Tune for your business hours.

policies.name: T1083 File and Directory Discovery — outside business hours (early)
policies.message: MITRE T1083: file discovery between 00:00 and 06:59 UTC. Tune for your business hours.

policies.name: T1020 Automated Exfiltration — throttle flailing agent (high error rate)
policies.message: MITRE T1020: agent recent_error_rate > 0.5 across last >= 4 events — likely a runaway loop or retry storm.

policies.name: T1053 Scheduled Task/Job — cron / launchd persistence
policies.message: MITRE T1053: agent attempted to write a persistent task. Possible C2 persistence.

policies.name: T1552 Unsecured Credentials — read of well-known credential store
policies.message: MITRE T1552: agent attempted to read a credential store. Tighten the path regex for your environment.
